name: Karthick Raja K
about: Compassionate and highly skilled Critical Care Registered Nurse with 3+ years of experience in Neuro ICU and Transplant ICU settings. Expertise in managing complex neurological cases such as traumatic brain injuries, stroke, and post-craniotomy patients, along with comprehensive transplant patient care. Proficient in hemodynamic monitoring, ventilator management, and delivering high-quality patient-centered care in fast-paced environments.

education.university: Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences

experience.name: Sakra World Hospital
responsibilities: Performed advanced neurological assessments including GCS and pupil reactivity
Managed ICP monitors, EVDs, and lumbar drains for neurosurgical patients
Administered neuro-specific medications such as Mannitol, hypertonic saline, and anti-epileptics
Handled post-operative care for craniotomy, spinal, and trauma patients
Assisted in acute stroke management and critical neuro emergency protocols

experience.name: KIMS Hospital
responsibilities: Managed pre- and post-operative care for kidney, liver, and multi-organ transplant patients
Monitored patients for signs of organ rejection, infection, and complications
Performed advanced hemodynamic monitoring using arterial and central lines
Maintained fluid and electrolyte balance in critically ill transplant patients
